name: Home — attestation feed loads with content

planSteps.description: Navigate to the home page at https://dallasbuyersclub.vercel.app/
Wait up to 15 seconds for the page to finish loading (React hydration + attestation feed fetch from /api/stellar-attestations)
The page shows the hero title containing 'Dallas Buyers Club' or 'Agent Alliance'

The attestation feed section is visible and contains at least one attestation card — either live Soroban attestations or the hardcoded fallback entries (tx hashes starting with 7f1138e7 or 30ba9832). The feed must NOT be empty and must NOT show a raw error message.
